facts.dispatch.branch: branch_statement header and indented block -> PythonDispatchBranchFact(span, line, lines) -> Fact(payload.lines, span, line)
facts.function.body: function_definition | async_function_definition full block -> PythonFunctionBodyFact(name, kind, span, line, lines) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.lines, span, line)
facts.name.binding: assignment_statement target identifier -> PythonNameFact(kind:binding, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.function: function_definition.name outside class body -> PythonNameFact(kind:function, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.method: function_definition.name inside class body -> PythonNameFact(kind:method, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)
facts.name.parameter: parameter identifier -> PythonNameFact(kind:parameter, span, line) -> Fact(payload.name, payload.kind, payload.issue_kind, span, line)

recovery.line.parser: diagnostics are source-backed and facts may emit for recoverable line shapes
recovery.raw_ast.recovery: unknown line ranges remain source-backed raw text
